items.name: Pointe Shoes 3.0 - White
items.description: Pointe shoes are specialized ballet shoes designed for dancers to perform on the tips of their toes. They have a reinforced toe box, stiff sole, and ribbons to support the dancer's feet, enabling graceful movements and intricate ballet techniques.

items.name: ✧♡✧ Black Goth Lace Bodysuit Edgy Fit
items.description: This black latex bodysuit, with its studded neckline and romantic lace details, is made for girls who want to embrace their power and femininity. Inspired by Cammy White’s iconic strength, it’s the perfect choice for a Valentine’s Day. Perfect for performances, or anyone looking to add a bold touch to their style.
